Monday, May 4, 2026

Seattle News

Mariners Honor Seattle Steelheads, Connect Negro League Legacy

The Seattle Mariners paid tribute to the Seattle Steelheads, connecting Negro League baseball legacy to a new generation of fans.

Hundreds Rally at Cal Anderson Park for Workers' Rights

Demonstrators packed Cal Anderson Park for a May Day rally ahead of a workers' rights march through downtown Seattle.

MyNorthwest · Read more

KOMO Rowing Crew Wins 2026 Windermere Media Cup

KOMO 4's rowing crew took home the trophy at the annual Windermere Media Cup charity rowing competition.

KOMO News · Read more

Millions of Americans May Now Qualify for Canadian Citizenship

New policy changes could make millions of Americans eligible for Canadian citizenship through ancestral connections.

Technology

Elon Musk Takes Stand in High-Stakes OpenAI Trial

Tesla CEO Elon Musk testified in a bitter feud against OpenAI cofounders Sam Altman and Greg Brockman that could reshape AI development future.

AP News · News · Read more

Nvidia B300 Servers Hit $1 Million in China Amid US Curbs

Exclusive report shows Nvidia's B300 server prices reaching $1 million in China due to US export restrictions on AI chips.

Reuters · News · Read more

Human Brain May Work More Like AI Than Expected

Scientists discover the human brain understands spoken language in ways that closely resemble advanced AI language models.

ScienceDaily · News · Read more

TADI: New Agentic AI System for Drilling Operations

Tool-Augmented Drilling Intelligence transforms operational data into evidence-based analytical insights for the energy sector.
